productName: Honey Bunches of Oats Granola Honey Roasted

classification.reason: milk ingredient found in user-provided ingredient list

ingredients.rawText: Whole grain rolled oats, brown sugar, whole grain wheat, whole grain rice, canola oil, corn syrup, whey (from milk), sugar, wildflower honey, caramel color, vitamins and minerals: niacinamide, reduced iron, zinc oxide (source of zinc), vitamin B6, vitamin A palmitate, riboflavin (vitamin B2), thiamin mononitrate (vitamin B1), folic acid, vitamin B12, vitamin D.

notes: Displayed severity in the app was CONTAINS, which matches the user-provided ingredient list.
